name: SuiMCP (Mysten)
description: 12 tools: wallet management, balance queries, Move build/test/publish. Built by Mysten Labs engineer.
install: npx -y @anthropic-ai/claude-code mcp add sui-mcp -- npx -y sui-mcp

name: Sui MCP (Tamago Labs)
description: 33+ tools: wallet ops, staking, Scallop DeFi integration, Pyth oracle, SuiNS domains.
install: npx -y @anthropic-ai/claude-code mcp add sui-mcp-tamago -- npx -y tamago-sui-mcp

name: Sui MCP Server
description: General Sui blockchain MCP server for transaction building and querying.
install: npx -y @anthropic-ai/claude-code mcp add sui-mcp-server -- npx -y sui-mcp-server

name: Sui Wallet MCP
description: Wallet management, transactions, and blockchain operations for Sui.
install: npx -y @anthropic-ai/claude-code mcp add sui-wallet-mcp -- npx -y sui-wallet-mcp

name: SuiSource MCP
description: Source code verification for Sui Move packages.
install: npx -y @anthropic-ai/claude-code mcp add suisource-mcp -- npx -y suisource-mcp

name: SuiNS MCP
description: SuiNS domain name service integration — resolve names, register domains.
install: npx -y @anthropic-ai/claude-code mcp add suins-mcp -- npx -y suins-mcp

name: Sui AI Agent Kit
description: DeFi tools for Suilend, STEAMM, SpringSui. MCP server + TypeScript framework for AI agents.
install: npx -y @anthropic-ai/claude-code mcp add sui-agent-kit -- npx -y sui-agent-kit-mcp

name: Motion Labs Sui MCP
description: Sui blockchain MCP server by Motion Labs.
install: npx -y @anthropic-ai/claude-code mcp add motion-sui-mcp -- npx -y motion-sui-mcp
